# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-prod

variables:
  ARTIFACTS_BUCKET: $CI_PROJECT_NAME-artifacts
  DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET: $CI_PROJECT_NAME-deployments

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs"
    - mkdir -p artifacts/binaries
    - cp binary1.jar artifacts/binaries/
    - cp config.properties artifacts/configs/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/binaries/*
      - artifacts/configs/*
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy-dev
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to dev environment"
    - aws s3 cp $ARTIFACTS_BUCKET/artifacts/binaries/* s3://$DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/dev/
    - aws s3 cp $ARTIFACTS_BUCKET/artifacts/configs/* s3://$DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/dev/

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy-prod
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to prod environment"
    - aws s3 cp $ARTIFACTS_BUCKET/artifacts/binaries/* s3://$DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/prod/
    - aws s3 cp $ARTIFACTS_BUCKET/artifacts/configs/* s3://$DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/prod/

security:
  secrets:
    AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: $AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
    AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: $AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
